channel.title: ARX — Market Insights & Trading Analysis
channel.description: Insights on DeFi copy trading, market regime detection, wallet intelligence, and Hyperliquid. Stay ahead with ARX.

item.title: Oil Perps Hit $2.4B Daily Volume — Trade the Hormuz Crisis On-Chain (2026)
item.description: Hyperliquid oil perps now trade more than Bitcoin. Learn how the Strait of Hormuz crisis created a $2.4B/day market and how to trade crude oil perpetuals 24/7 with zero overnight fees.

item.title: BTC Rallies 5% to $74K — Hyperliquid Whales Still Net Short $77M
item.description: Bitcoin rallies to $74.4K but Hyperliquid S-tier whales remain net short $76.7M. On-chain data + VIX analysis on arx.trade.

item.title: Why Trade Gold On-Chain? Perps vs ETFs vs COMEX — Fees, Leverage & 24/7 Access (2026)
item.description: Compare trading gold on-chain via perpetuals vs gold ETFs vs COMEX futures. Zero overnight fees, 24/7 access, up to 50x leverage, and self-custody. Complete cost breakdown for gold traders.

item.title: RWA Perps vs CFD Brokers: Overnight Fees, Custody & Why Traders Switch (2026)
item.description: RWA perpetuals vs CFD brokers compared: overnight fees (0% vs 5-10% annual), self-custody vs broker custody, 24/7 trading vs market hours. Real cost breakdown for gold, oil, and S&P 500 traders.

item.title: Hyperliquid Airdrop Season 2: How to Maximize Your HYPE Allocation (2026)
item.description: Hyperliquid Season 2 has 238.8M HYPE tokens allocated. Learn the points system, HLP 3x multiplier, eligibility criteria, and 5 strategies to maximize your airdrop allocation.

item.title: The Perp DEX Wars of 2026: Hyperliquid vs Lighter vs Aster Compared
item.description: Hyperliquid, Lighter, and Aster are battling for perp DEX dominance. Compare fees, speed, volume, and copy trading features — and see which platform wins for your trading style.

item.title: Hyperliquid vs GMX v2: ETH Perp Liquidity, Fees & dYdX Compared (2026)
item.description: Hyperliquid vs GMX v2 liquidity comparison 2026: ETH perp depth, taker fees, execution speed, and leverage. Includes dYdX. Data-backed winner per category with live numbers.

item.title: What Is Copy Trading in Crypto? How It Works, Risks & Best Platforms (2026)
item.description: What is copy trading in crypto? Learn how it works, the real risks nobody mentions, and how DeFi copy trading on Hyperliquid eliminates the middleman. Beginner-friendly guide.

item.title: 7 Best Hyperliquid Trading Bots & Copy Trading Tools (2026)
item.description: Compare the best Hyperliquid trading bots and copy trading tools for 2026. Covers Hyperdash, Mizar, Coinrule, and more — with features, fees, and honest pros/cons.

item.title: Hyperliquid Vaults Explained: HLP APY, 3x Airdrop Multiplier, Lockup & Risks (2026)
item.description: How Hyperliquid HLP vaults work in 2026: deposit USDC, earn ~20% APY, get the 3x airdrop multiplier. 4-day lockup period, 10% leader fee, and real risks explained before you deposit.

item.title: Market Regime Detection for Crypto: 5 Regimes Every Trader Must Know
item.description: Market regime detection classifies crypto markets into 5 states — Trending, Range-Bound, Transition, Compression, Crisis — so you use the right strategy at the right time.

item.title: How to Copy Trade on Hyperliquid: Best Platforms & Guide (2026)
item.description: The best Hyperliquid copy trading platforms in 2026, compared. Step-by-step guide to follow elite DeFi traders on-chain — no KYC, no middlemen.
